score_axes.retention_confidence: 0=none, 1=theory only, 2=published metastability or SSCHA logic, 3=near-ambient evidence, 4=ambient superconductivity demonstrated
score_axes.synthesis_accessibility: 0=not demonstrated, 1=>50 GPa, 2=15-50 GPa, 3=1-15 GPa, 4=ambient or standard
score_axes.materials_practicality: 0=toxic or very scarce, 1=expensive or reactive, 2=moderate, 3=common or benign, 4=scalable

ranked_entries.name: RbPH3
ranked_entries.retention_note: Published theory with ionic-anharmonic metastability, but no direct mixed-evidence validation.
ranked_entries.materials_note: Reactive chemistry but no extreme toxicity penalty.

ranked_entries.name: KB3C3
ranked_entries.retention_note: Framework benchmark only; ambient story is still literature-led.
ranked_entries.materials_note: Better materials profile than heavy-metal clathrates.

ranked_entries.name: KRbB6C6
ranked_entries.retention_note: Ambient clathrate benchmark with weaker synthesis grounding.
ranked_entries.materials_note: Moderate practicality; not a toxicity outlier.

ranked_entries.name: SrAuH3
ranked_entries.retention_note: Interesting ambient comparator, but preprint-level and locally unscreened.

ranked_entries.name: Mg2CoH6
ranked_entries.retention_note: Known compound, but the superconductivity route is not yet validated inside the shared screen.
ranked_entries.materials_note: Better practical profile than Ir-heavy analogs.

ranked_entries.name: Mg2IrH6
ranked_entries.retention_note: Contradiction-tracked and penalized by the local 0 GPa hull failure.
ranked_entries.materials_note: Ir scarcity is a real penalty.

ranked_entries.name: Mg2RhH6
ranked_entries.retention_note: Still waiting on basic mixed evidence.
ranked_entries.materials_note: Better than Ir but still expensive.

ranked_entries.name: CsIn0.5Sn0.5H3
ranked_entries.materials_note: Moderate chemistry, but no direct evidence.

ranked_entries.name: PbNH4B6C6
ranked_entries.materials_note: Lead toxicity is a hard penalty.

ranked_entries.name: SrNH4B6C6
ranked_entries.retention_note: Rejected after the worst local hull failure in the framework set.
ranked_entries.materials_note: Less toxic than Pb, but still not competitive.

phase09_primary.name: RbPH3
phase09_primary.reason: Best remaining hydride-side ambient target even after the conservative screen.

phase09_benchmark.name: KB3C3
phase09_benchmark.reason: Best framework-side ambient benchmark for comparison if the hydride path collapses.

no_go_reason: No Phase 08 entry has a decisive mixed-evidence ambient success inside the shared 0-5 GPa screen.
consumer_guardrail: Do not use consumer-hardware language unless P_op = 0 GPa and nontrivial retention confidence are both supported by mixed evidence. No Phase 08 entry clears that bar.
